reviews.comment:
Una pena! Paramos a cargar agua caliente para el termo y nos quisieron cobrar $50. A 15 km la Estación YPF Ruta 12 Km 1037 dan el agua GRATIS. Deberían aprender a dar un buen servicio en el ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Shame! We stopped to fill up the hot water tank and they tried to charge us $50. 15 km away, the YPF Station at Route 12, Km 1037, gives away the water for free. They should learn how to provide good service at the ACA.
